Filer held Bitcoin (BTC) at the time that the Bitcoin Gold (BTG) fork was deployed. As a result, filer is entitled to receive a proportional number of BTG tokens based on the amount of BTC held on the fork date. To date, filer has not claimed those tokens.

Filer held Bitcoin (BTC) at the time that the eCash (XEC) fork was deployed. As a result, filer is entitled to receive a proportional number of XEC tokens based on the amount of BTC held on the fork date. To date, filer has not claimed those tokens.
This entry represents 9 aggregated accounts at a single financial institution.

Agreement for right to obtain a 3% interest in any fund formed by Founders Fund in future years. I will divest all interests, including any carried interests, in any such future fund that makes its first capital call during my tenure as Ambassador. (2018-09-01)
